appearancePrompt: Il etait un homme que toutes les minorites redoutes terriblement ! Il avait un gourdin magique, dont la violence n'avait d'egal que la perte d'intellecte qu'il procurait.

Un gros gourdin appartenant a Alexandre François avant la chute.

mainHand.name: Le gourdin d'AF

history:
Before the heavens suffocated under a permanent blanket of soot, AF was defined by a different life. Built on the legacy of Il etait un homme que toutes les minorites redoutes terriblement ! Il avait un gourdin magique, dont la violence n'avait d'egal que la perte d'intellecte qu'il procurait. , they participated in the shimmering final years of the 20th century, before the sky darkened and the world dissolved.

The end did not arrive with a scream, but with the silent, creeping advance of the Great Fog. AF witnessed the terrifying transition as the horizon vanished and the sun became a pale, dying ember. They navigated the frantic desperation of the era, where the last vestiges of sovereignty were traded for drops of fuel.

When the surface finally became uninhabitable, the migration into the deep began. AF lived through the agonizing silence of the underground vaults, surviving for years behind reinforced structural shells as the world they remembered slowly turned to dust.

Emerging from the vaults, AF found a planet that no longer recognized its masters. They became a scavenger of the wastes, reclaiming artifacts of the past to build the foundations of a new, fractured society, proving to be a vital component in the machinery of reclamation.

Today, as a specialized Militia Member, AF has finally stabilized their position within the rising City-States. Their life is no longer about remembering the blue skies of the Old World, but about mastering the gray horizons of the Ash-Trail. Each step is a testament to a spirit for whom the Ash has finally become home.

name: AF

occupation.description: Not a professional soldier, but picked up a weapon when it mattered. Learned to fight from necessity, not training. Good instincts, rough technique.
occupation.name: Militia Member

skills.description: Strike with your equipped weapon. Replaces base damage with weapon's flat damage modifier. Melee: scales with Strength. Ranged: fixed damage only.

effects.description: Replaces skill base damage with the equipped weapon's flat damage value.
effects.name: Weapon Damage Replacement

skills.name: Use Weapon

skills.description: Push an enemy back and potentially cause shock damage.
skills.name: Shove

skills.description: Protect an ally for 1 turn. You tank damage redirected to them with reductions based on your Endurance vs Incoming Damage.
skills.name: Defend

skills.description: Become invisible to enemies. Any damage taken will reveal you. Duration increases with Wisdom.
skills.name: Hide

skills.description: Bother the enemy with your charisma, reducing their MP based on your Charisma vs target Wisdom.
skills.name: Distract

skills.description: Find weaknesses in the target, increasing critical chance for all attackers based on your Intelligence. (Max difference: 5 levels)
skills.name: Analyze

traits.description: A rugged constitution that refuses to break. +15 Max HP.
traits.name: Hardy

traits.description: Wounds take a long time to clot. Bleeding effects last twice as long.
traits.name: Anemic

traits.description: 10% chance to fail complex manual tasks and waste resources.
traits.name: Clumsy

traits.description: Obsessive focus. Misses secondary objectives more often.
traits.name: Tunnel Vision

traits.description: Hears voices in radio static. Random morale fluctuations.
traits.name: Static Whispers

traits.description: Massive resistance to food poisoning and radiation sickness from water.
traits.name: Iron Gut

traits.description: Broad shoulders meant for heavy lifting. +20% Inventory capacity.
traits.name: Stout

traits.description: Less likely to bleed from minor wounds and environment hazards.
traits.name: Thick Skinned

traits.description: Enjoys socializing with crew. Boosts others morale slightly, but uses 10% more water.
traits.name: Talkative

traits.description: Rarely shares details. Harder for enemies to read you, but crew trust grows slowly.
traits.name: Mysterious

traits.description: The world broke you long ago. Immune to Morale shifts (positive or negative).
traits.name: Stoic Outcast

traits.description: Quickly becomes panicked when HP drops below 40%.
traits.name: Cowardly

traits.description: You can actually read the old manuals. +15% XP Gain.
traits.name: Pre-Ash Scholar
